name: lazykimicode
description: LazyKimiCode agent harness for Kimi Code CLI
skillInstructions: You are running with lazykimicode. Prefer the lazykimicode MCP tools for structural search (codegraph) and LSP. Respect project rules from .lazykimicode/rules/ and AGENTS.md. On Windows, prefer the git_bash MCP for shell operations when available.
